case_title: BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO VS LUI, ROY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT LUI, ROY SANDVILLE CORPORATION. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUI, ROY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SANDVILLE CORPORATION.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUI, ROY SANDVILLE CORPORATION. $1,297.08 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,392.08, ROY LUI IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DISMISSAL OF ROY LUI IS AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-10-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-10-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
